title: Header logo SVG reported as hidden in E2E test
body: The test 'header logo is present' finds the SVG element (12 locators resolved) but Playwright reports it as hidden. Investigate if this is a CSS visibility issue, timing issue, or environmental difference in CI. Locator: 'header a[href="/"] svg'.first(). This is marked as 'flaky' in CI (passes sometimes), suggesting a timing or environmental issue.
rationale: This is a CI failure that needs investigation. The SVG exists in DOM but is reported as hidden - could be CSS animation, loading state, or rendering issue specific to CI environment.
